item.title: NTFS Hard Disk Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: NTFS Hard Disk Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: driverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS Hard Disk Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
NTFS data retrieval software is an ultimate data recovery tool that regains data lost due to human faults, virus or worm infection, disk formats, corrupted MBR and MFT files or boot disk failure, BIOS error, partitioning error, power failure or system hangs etc. NTFS data restoration program that is specially designed and developed to backup all your office documents and other important files and folders from NTFS file system. Shareware NTFS data recovery utility restores lost data in all major file formats including text file (doc, txt, pdf, ppt, and html), picture (jpg, gif, tiff, bmp etc) and audio-video (wav, mp3, mp4, aiff, asf, avi etc) from corrupted NTFS hard disk partitions. Advanced NTFS hard disk data rescue program restores lost files even if ‘Disk Boot Failure or Drive Not Formatted error messages are displayed on your laptop-desktop system. NTFS file restoration application successfully installed on any Windows operating systems including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8,Win7 x32. NTFS data revival program uses advanced algorithms to scan and recovers deleted files from Windows hard disk drive partitioned on NTFS file system and saved data at user specified location on your computer hard disk. Cost effective NTFS data recovery program provides preview of recovered files and folders in tree like hierarchical structure before actual data recovery. Features:*Shareware NTFS file rescue tool supports recovery of long file name as well as encrypted and compressed files.*NTFS data recovery software supports recovery of deleted data from hard disk drives partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.*Advanced NTFS hard disk data salvage program that is easy to use and restores lost files and folders from inaccessible or corrupted hard disk drive. *Professional NTFS partitioned file recovery program restores data even if deleted from recycle bin or by pressing shift + delete key.

[read more]
item.description:
NTFS Hard Disk Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
NTFS data retrieval software is an ultimate data recovery tool that regains data lost due to human faults, virus or worm infection, disk formats, corrupted MBR and MFT files or boot disk failure, BIOS error, partitioning error, power failure or system hangs etc. NTFS data restoration program that is specially designed and developed to backup all your office documents and other important files and folders from NTFS file system. Shareware NTFS data recovery utility restores lost data in all major file formats including text file (doc, txt, pdf, ppt, and html), picture (jpg, gif, tiff, bmp etc) and audio-video (wav, mp3, mp4, aiff, asf, avi etc) from corrupted NTFS hard disk partitions. NTFS file restoration application successfully installed on any Windows operating systems including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8,Win7 x32. NTFS data revival program uses advanced algorithms to scan and recovers deleted files from Windows hard disk drive partitioned on NTFS file system and saved data at user specified location on your computer hard disk. [read more]
item.content:encoded:
NTFS Hard Disk Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
NTFS data retrieval software is an ultimate data recovery tool that regains data lost due to human faults, virus or worm infection, disk formats, corrupted MBR and MFT files or boot disk failure, BIOS error, partitioning error, power failure or system hangs etc. NTFS data restoration program that is specially designed and developed to backup all your office documents and other important files and folders from NTFS file system. Shareware NTFS data recovery utility restores lost data in all major file formats including text file (doc, txt, pdf, ppt, and html), picture (jpg, gif, tiff, bmp etc) and audio-video (wav, mp3, mp4, aiff, asf, avi etc) from corrupted NTFS hard disk partitions. Advanced NTFS hard disk data rescue program restores lost files even if ‘Disk Boot Failure or Drive Not Formatted error messages are displayed on your laptop-desktop system. NTFS file restoration application successfully installed on any Windows operating systems including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8,Win7 x32. NTFS data revival program uses advanced algorithms to scan and recovers deleted files from Windows hard disk drive partitioned on NTFS file system and saved data at user specified location on your computer hard disk. Cost effective NTFS data recovery program provides preview of recovered files and folders in tree like hierarchical structure before actual data recovery. Features:*Shareware NTFS file rescue tool supports recovery of long file name as well as encrypted and compressed files.*NTFS data recovery software supports recovery of deleted data from hard disk drives partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.*Advanced NTFS hard disk data salvage program that is easy to use and restores lost files and folders from inaccessible or corrupted hard disk drive. *Professional NTFS partitioned file recovery program restores data even if deleted from recycle bin or by pressing shift + delete key.

[read more]

item.title: iPod Data Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: iPod Data Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: driverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
iPod Data Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Download easiest and fastest music data recovery solution to retrieve all songs files which deleted accidentally from Apple iPod digital media player. iPod data recovery software recover lost deleted corrupted music songs playlist, mp3, mp4, pictures, images, digital photographs and all previously existing data stored in your iPod digital audio video player. iPod music files restoration software helps to recover your valuable files and folders lost due to accidental deletion, device failure, virus attack, software or hardware malfunctioning, improper restoration or any logical crash in iPod devices and many more similar reasons. iPod music files rescue tool is capable to recover all missing files like wav, mp3, mp4 etc from inaccessible and logically crashed iPod memory. iPod data restoration program safely retrieve damaged photo files from iPod Shuffle within few seconds. iPod data recovery software recover erased and deleted data (audio, video music songs, digital pictures, images, graphics, documents) from corrupted or logically crashed iPod in almost all cases of corruption. iPod data retrieval application supports all iPods music device in various storage capacities (such as 512 MB, 1 GB, 2 GB, 4GB and 8 GB etc) and all versions of iTunes. Music recovery application provides easy solution to recover data saved in major type of files including pictures, music, video, text document etc stored in iPod device.iPod data recovery software features: * Music rescue software provides clear preview of all recovered files, folders of media player.* iPod data recovery software recovers corrupted mp3, mpeg, wav, and other data files.* Program support all major iPod models including iPod Mini, iPod Nano, iPod Shuffle and iPod first generation to next generation models.* Tool easily works on Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 10 x64,Windows 8,Win7 x32 operating system.

[read more]
item.description:
iPod Data Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Download easiest and fastest music data recovery solution to retrieve all songs files which deleted accidentally from Apple iPod digital media player. iPod data recovery software recover lost deleted corrupted music songs playlist, mp3, mp4, pictures, images, digital photographs and all previously existing data stored in your iPod digital audio video player. iPod music files restoration software helps to recover your valuable files and folders lost due to accidental deletion, device failure, virus attack, software or hardware malfunctioning, improper restoration or any logical crash in iPod devices and many more similar reasons. iPod music files rescue tool is capable to recover all missing files like wav, mp3, mp4 etc from inaccessible and logically crashed iPod memory. iPod data restoration program safely retrieve damaged photo files from iPod Shuffle within few seconds. iPod data recovery software recover erased and deleted data (audio, video music songs, digital pictures, images, graphics, documents) from corrupted or logically crashed iPod in almost all cases of corruption. iPod data retrieval application supports all iPods music device in various storage capacities (such as 512 MB, 1 GB, 2 GB, 4GB and 8 GB etc) and all versions of iTunes. item.title: Professional Data Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional Data Recovery Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: driverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Data Recovery Software
(Office Apps)
Are you worried of how to retrieve infected media files from music players in few mouse clicks? If yes then use Drive Recovery Software that provides simplest way to fetch inaccessible word documents from hard disk drive without any modification. Powerful data undelete utility regains erased audio songs, images and many more from USB digital media storage drive at affordable cost.

[read more]

item.title: GSM Mobile Messaging Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile Messaging Tool [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: androidmobile1
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile Messaging Tool
(Chat & Messenging)
Free GSM Mobile Messaging tool broadcasts sms Send thousands of text messages from pc with Free GSM Mobile Messaging software www.freemobilemessaging.org presents Free GSM Mobile Messaging program helps you to send group sms from your PC to any cell phone network across the world. Free GSM Mobile Messaging software from www.freemobilemessaging.org helps colleges and universities in broadcasting news, job alerts to students in mass. How to stay in touch with employees? Information sharing tool facilitates Telecom companies to easily communicate with employees and clients by broadcasting group messages to them. Download Free GSM Mobile Messaging software from www.freemobilemessaging.org helps user to broadcast bulk sms in form of business updates, seasonal greetings, new alerts and event information around the globe. How to save money from making unnecessary phone calls? SMS broadcasting software facilitates business owner easily communicate with clients and consumers by sending mass text messages to them. Mobile messaging program quickly broadcasts unlimited sms from your computer without requiring any internet connection. Group sms broadcasting tool sends text and multimedia messages from your PC connected with GSM mobile phone.

[read more]

item.title: Barcode Maker for Retail Business [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Maker for Retail Business [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Maker for Retail Business
(Office Apps)
Website provides innovative barcode maker for retail business application that forms reliable and customized inventory tracking barcode image labels capturing complete information of every single product sold from the stock and remaining goods in firm inventory providing business managers absolute graphical report and statistics of retail trade. Advanced retail business inventory barcode utility develops eye-catching and high-resolution label tags by empowering user to alter barcode image appearance and dimensions by modifying barcode image designing view properties, label tag common color shape and font settings, barcode label printing particulars and image batch process settings as per the requirements of business merchandize. Versatile barcode maker for retail business program creates mass quantity of product label sticker having unique or distinct identification by applying stable, random varying value or sequential series succession techniques of generating barcode image list with support to all major linear and 2D font designing symbologies. Effective retail inventory barcode tag maker software provides user option to automatically retrieve or manually configure barcode image value and properties like series algorithm, image header footer, check sum options, color and appearance, font standards, general image settings, tag aligning properties and many more.Features:* Business barcode developing software forms reliable and easily scanable label tags.* Barcode design utility provides user advanced label image designing options and tools.* Inventory tracking barcode software captures complete details of product sold and stock.* Retail barcode maker application provides user graphical menu support and context help.

[read more]
item.description:
Barcode Maker for Retail Business
(Office Apps)
Website provides innovative barcode maker for retail business application that forms reliable and customized inventory tracking barcode image labels capturing complete information of every single product sold from the stock and remaining goods in firm inventory providing business managers absolute graphical report and statistics of retail trade. Advanced retail business inventory barcode utility develops eye-catching and high-resolution label tags by empowering user to alter barcode image appearance and dimensions by modifying barcode image designing view properties, label tag common color shape and font settings, barcode label printing particulars and image batch process settings as per the requirements of business merchandize. Versatile barcode maker for retail business program creates mass quantity of product label sticker having unique or distinct identification by applying stable, random varying value or sequential series succession techniques of generating barcode image list with support to all major linear and 2D font designing symbologies. Effective retail inventory barcode tag maker software provides user option to automatically retrieve or manually configure barcode image value and properties like series algorithm, image header footer, check sum options, color and appearance, font standards, general image settings, tag aligning properties and many more.Features:* Business barcode developing software forms reliable and easily scanable label tags.* Barcode design utility provides user advanced label image designing options and tools.* Inventory tracking barcode software captures complete details of product sold and stock.* Retail barcode maker application provides user graphical menu support and context help.

[read more]

Website provides innovative barcode maker for retail business application that forms reliable and customized inventory tracking barcode image labels capturing complete information of every single product sold from the stock and remaining goods in firm inventory providing business managers absolute graphical report and statistics of retail trade. Advanced retail business inventory barcode utility develops eye-catching and high-resolution label tags by empowering user to alter barcode image appearance and dimensions by modifying barcode image designing view properties, label tag common color shape and font settings, barcode label printing particulars and image batch process settings as per the requirements of business merchandize. Versatile barcode maker for retail business program creates mass quantity of product label sticker having unique or distinct identification by applying stable, random varying value or sequential series succession techniques of generating barcode image list with support to all major linear and 2D font designing symbologies. Effective retail inventory barcode tag maker software provides user option to automatically retrieve or manually configure barcode image value and properties like series algorithm, image header footer, check sum options, color and appearance, font standards, general image settings, tag aligning properties and many more.Features:* Business barcode developing software forms reliable and easily scanable label tags.* Barcode design utility provides user advanced label image designing options and tools.* Inventory tracking barcode software captures complete details of product sold and stock.* Retail barcode maker application provides user graphical menu support and context help.

item.title: Fat Drive Data Recovery [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Fat Drive Data Recovery [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: driverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Fat Drive Data Recovery
(Office Apps)
Award winning FAT data restoration program free demo version is helpful to understand its working functionalities for quick revival of birthday party pictures lost from hard drive due to improper system shutdown. Simple to operate Fat Drive Data Recovery software for disk drive does not require any specific expert guidance to use it for retrieval of files lost due to various error reasons including formatted drives, user mistake, system crash and more.

[read more]

Simple to operate Fat Drive Data Recovery software for disk drive does not require any specific expert guidance to use it for retrieval of files lost due to various error reasons including formatted drives, user mistake, system crash and more.

item.title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: GAMWING [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]
item.description:
GAMWING
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The GamWing Magisk module is a powerful tool designed to enhance the gaming experience on Android devices. By seamlessly integrating with the Magisk framework, it provides users with a range of optimizations and features aimed at delivering maximum gaming performance.
This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.
[read more]

This module offers performance enhancements such as CPU and GPU optimizations, RAM management improvements, and system tweaks that prioritize gaming resources. It also provides options to reduce background processes, minimize input lag, and optimize network connectivity for smoother online gaming.

GamWing's focus on maximizing gaming experience ensures that gamers can enjoy faster load times, higher frame rates, and reduced stuttering while playing their favorite mobile games. With its ease of installation and customization, the GamWing Magisk module is a go-to solution for gamers looking to elevate their Android gaming performance to the next level.

item.title: Drive Recovery Software Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Drive Recovery Software Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: driverecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Drive Recovery Software Tool
(Office Apps)
Looking for best option to undelete removed audio songs? Company offers extraordinary data restoration software for memory card on website www.driverecovery.org that is fully capable to retrieve deleted images from various types of cards like MMC, XD, SD and more. Professionally designed Drive Recovery program offers better solution for salvage of memorable image collection deleted from compact flash cards due to human mistake.

item.title: Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software
(Office Apps)
No need of technical guidance to operate Publisher Barcode Label Maker Software for producing a bunch of stylish library tickets, price stickers, voucher coupons etc within short time period. Label designer tool generates library stickers including solid color, gradient image and unique text value within few minutes. Expert label maker tool designs barcode list using different series creating functions like sequential, random and constant value in some mouse clicks.

[read more]

Employee ID Badges Creator
(Financial)
Visit www.barcodelabelcreator.org and download cost effective Employee ID Badges Creator program which is beneficial for business industries to create their staff member identification card with photo, text and graphics addition facility on system. ID card creator software facilitates all common users to create their fresh and good looking ID card or alter the features of an existing card as per user needs.
